_notes: DOC-107 Phase 6 — distributed anchor sidecar for the Soft Cellar (1.3.1).
Authors `pentagram_chamber` as a NEW anchor born in sidecar form — it
was never defined in data/quests.json.anchors. This demonstrates the
sidecar-first authoring pattern: floor-scoped anchors can be created
entirely without touching the central registry. The map editor track
writes directly here, and extract-floors.js harvests it on the next
Coordinates (14, 8) are the §4.2 spec example; the actual pentagram
chamber geometry lives in the blockout grid and can be retargeted by
editing this file alone. The pentagram-wash demo sidequest
(side.1.3.1.pentagram_wash) uses a minigame predicate keyed on the
SpraySystem 'tile_clean' subTarget rather than this anchor — so
pentagram_chamber is currently a future-use entry demonstrating that
sidecar anchors are referenceable from any quest step (central or
